creator: lushijia@gmail.com
text:
I want to install packages post-installation, but I think I have met some problems. I selected all the pre-compiled packages binaries to install including apache-1.3.39_2.tbz, apache-2.2.6_2.tbz and apache+mod_ssl-1.3.39+2.8.30.tbz. Unfortunately, during the installation, the FreeBSD told me that "package apache-1.3.39 was added successfully" but "add of package apache-2.2.6_2 aborted, error code 1 - Please check the debug screen for more info."

Is there someone can help me?
